purpose: Generate new per-topic scene images for combinatorial paradox explainers. Bundled validation panels are fallback only.

global_prompt_rules.language: Prompt in English; all title, subtitle, and numeric overlays stay in Remotion, not inside the image.
must_avoid: no dashboard UI or chart software screenshots
no cartoon, anime, comic, or cute mascot style
no brand logos or copyrighted interfaces

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Cinematic intellectual evidence frame for a math explainer about {{topic}}. Present the question '{{question_hook}}' through {{visual_metaphor}}. Dark studio table, parchment and black metal materials, practical spotlight, floating dust, restrained amber highlights, subtle teal helper accents, realistic paper grain, full-bleed 16:9 composition, center-weighted structure, calm lower third for subtitles, no embedded text. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, readable text, subtitles, stock office photo, app UI, comic style, childish props

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Premium mathematical tableau for {{topic}}. Show the tempting but incomplete intuition behind '{{section_claim}}' using {{relationship_object}} arranged as {{visual_metaphor}}. Several wrong or partial paths should be visible but elegant, with muted red warning accents only where needed. Cinematic top-down or stage-like composition, tactile paper surface, charcoal linework, editorial realism, no text baked into the image. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, flat infographic, bright warning graphics, game over screen, powerpoint slide, cartoon diagram

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Sophisticated mechanism-reveal still for {{topic}}. Reveal that the real driver is {{comparison_unit}} rather than single-point intuition. Use {{relationship_object}} and {{visual_metaphor}} so one highlighted element connects outward into a hidden structure. Warm parchment texture, charcoal and graphite linework, amber line illumination, subtle depth, high clarity, premium documentary math aesthetic, subtitle-safe lower third, no embedded text. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, chaotic spaghetti lines, trading terminal, meme layout, glossy sci-fi interface, toy-like characters

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Cinematic probability-board still for {{topic}}. Visualize '{{section_claim}}' through {{visual_metaphor}} with one dominant outcome marker representing {{key_number}}. The frame should feel like a hard-won numeric conclusion after a hidden structure is exposed. Refined academic composition, compressed curves or relationship traces, warm parchment, graphite blacks, amber focal highlight, high contrast but restrained, no image text. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, poster typography, dashboard widgets, flat chart pack, low-detail blur, purple HUD

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Reflective closing still for a philosophical math explainer about {{topic}}. Contrast intuition with deeper structure and express the takeaway '{{closing_takeaway}}' using {{visual_metaphor}}. Mature editorial tone, two-column or mirrored composition, aged paper and shadow texture, cinematic restraint, subtle human traces but no posed stock-photo look, safe center area for the final line and safe lower third for subtitles. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, motivational poster, business slide, emoji metaphor, cartoon figures, bright candy colors
